calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:52 A.M.: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, DEC-06-2012: PLAINTIFF HEDDI CUNDLE APPEARS IN PRO PER AS THE PLAINTIFF; VICTOR M. MARQUEZ, ESQ. APPEARS ON BEHALF OF MATTEO GARBELOTTO, WHO IS NOT PRESENT THIS DAY. THE STIPULATION IS SIGNED BY BOTH SIDES, AND THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH.

THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES BY PARTIES AND BY DEFENSE WITNESS GONZALEZ AND BY PLAINTIFF WITNESS PHILIP DILLARD WHO ARE AFFIRMED BY THE CLERK. IN ADDITION TO THE COURT RECEIVING AND REVIEWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY PARTIES.

10:38 A.M.: THE COURT HEARS CLOSING STATEMENT(S)TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND
RECEIVES ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE.
10:48 A.M.: THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE PRO TEM: ELLIOT MYLES; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Continued To Oct-02-12 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Reset From Jul-16-12 To Aug-13-12 At 06:30 P.M. In Dept 506
